hook: Boundaries are not just for protection; they are also a signal of self-respect.
body: Clear limits tell people that your attention is valuable, your time has shape, and your yes actually means something.

hook: Men who fear losing connection often become too available and then feel quietly resentful.
body: A respectful no or not yet is often healthier than a compliant yes that erodes your center.
